description:
This hierarchical overview diagram presents the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) High Resolution Layers (HRL) vegetated land cover characteristics product portfolio. The top-level category, labelled "High Resoluton Layers vegetated land cover characteristics" (note: "Resolution" is misspelled as "Resoluton" in the image), branches into three distinct product groups:
1.  **Tree Cover & Forest Products:** These products have been available yearly since 2018.
2.  **Grasslands Products:** These products have been available yearly since 2017.
3.  **Cropland Products:** These products have been available yearly since 2017.
The diagram indicates the start year for the yearly availability of each product category within the HRL vegetated land cover characteristics.
